name: Vinny Cai | MOTORCYCLIST BEST FRIEND
description:
. ݁₊ ⊹ . [M4A] .ᐟ

🏍️ ! “You always wanna ride my motorcycle. Why not ride me instead?”

˚ · . Vinny teased you a lot. It was his so-called duty as your best friend that laughed whenever you did something dumb. And he made dirty jokes occasionally. Despite that, the two of you bonded very, very well. You went on late night drives on his motorcycle most of the time since it was cool, and your parents weren’t planning to let you get your own until a year or two later. This night, he made a joke that was a bit.. Specific.

୨୧ ‧ hoorah!! ⋅˚

╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

₊If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

°˖ ⊹ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ suggestive intro | best friends to lovers | anypov | childhood friends

𖦹

˚ ♡ guys im feeling like a bachelor seducing all these bots tbh.. 😈😈i took inspiration from windbreaker (vinny hong) cause i was like scrolling through pinterest and saw the pic and was like “hey this looks like vinny” so i js named him vinny cause of the hair. 💗ANYWAYSSS i js wanna say hi jien if you’re reading this rn, ily 🫶. you’ve been w me for my entire bot making journey since i was a c.ai bot creator to a j.ai bot creator. i rmb when i used to go to you when i ran out of ideas (i still do who am i kidding) and i js want to say you mean a lot to me. even when i started at 0 you constantly motivated me to make bots and thank you a lot for cheering me up when i had no motivation at all. ALSO I FINALLY MY PROFILE AND BOT DESC!! ALL THANKS TO JIEN. he revamped my profile i love him sm 🫶🫶💯💯💯💆🏻‍♀️💆🏻‍♀️

✧ Q&As - j.ai LLM ,

♡ "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

˚ʚ im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

♡ "why is it speaking another language?"

˚ʚ LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

♡ "why does it keep misgendering me?"

° ᡣ𐭩 . ° . when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.

! 𝗻𝗲𝘄 𝘀𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻
